use_open: Not that I can think of

ai_risk_open: The LLM is based on information that has already been gathered, implying that we should not rely on AI to understand the present or future, or at least that such an understanding will be biased toward the past and any behavioral or social biases that we have experienced.
Still concerned about accuracy of models to capture under-represented populations - which will continue with inaccuracies about these groups. Really don't like the black box aspects of AI.
anything_else: I've been allowing AI assistance to a very small degree in my methods courses. I don't prohibit but do require transparency and acknowledgement.
